purpose: Resolve the remaining evidential and structural limits on Project FAR's final internal answer through one preregistered terminal extension program, then stop internal discovery at PR 280.
frozen_sc_w6_defeating_conditions: an assessable in-scope reasoning system requiring a genuine sixth irreducible primitive
a faithful uniform effective representation satisfying P* without RCCD-equivalent commitments
a demonstration that C* or P* is circularly defined by R1-R5
two successful kernels not bidirectionally reconstructible without hidden primitive machinery
evidence that one of R1-R5 is removable under P* without loss
decision_rules: Unknown is not Pass or Fail.
A genuine counterexample or extension overrides accumulated supportive mappings.
No additional supportive workstream may be inserted after PR 280.
reopening_rule: Reopen only for concrete evidence satisfying a preserved defeating condition or a separately registered empirical actual-process question.
nonclaims: unrestricted universality over inaccessible or non-effective processes
metaphysical fundamentality beneath every possible ontology
